input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8867 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-actuator:3.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Spring Boot 3.0 renamed/reworked some Actuator APIs, including the httptrace endpoint moving to httpexchanges, so generated tests must target 3.0 APIs rather than patching with extra dependencies.

Full application-style web exposure normally uses spring-boot-starter-actuator/autoconfigure and possibly a web stack, but meaningful coverage of the requested spring-boot-actuator artifact is reachable through its core endpoint and support classes without adding those dependencies.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is concretely required. The resolved Spring Boot Actuator 3.0.0 artifact depends only on spring-boot 3.0.0 and its normal Spring Framework transitives; the javac failure is from stale 2.6-era test code using changed or removed Actuator APIs, not missing setup.
